root.name: Add a text box with 'These are the key elements' positioned below the circles and text in slide 2
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly added a text box with the specified text and positioned it below the circles and text on slide 2.

children.name: Text box with 'These are the key elements' was added to slide 2
children.description: Checks if a new text box containing exactly 'These are the key elements' was added to slide 2.

children.name: Text box is positioned below the circles and text on slide 2
children.description: Checks that the text box is visually located below the circles and their associated text in slide 2.

children.name: No extraneous modifications to slide 2
children.description: Checks that there are no unnecessary changes (e.g., extra shapes, altered layout) to slide 2 except for the required text box.

metadata.task: Add a text box with 'These are the key elements' positioned below the circles and text in slide 2
